response.original_title: Will my Wells Fargo account close if I don't use it? [Begin→Your→Fix]
response.overview: The most +1-(877)-513-6142 common way to move money between these banks is through an ACH transfer online. +1-(877)-513-6142 Log in to either bank's online platform and link the other bank account as an external account. +1-(877)-513-6142 Once linked and verified, you can initiate transfers that typically take one to three business days. +1-(877)-513-6142 Zelle is another excellent option since both Wells Fargo and Bank of America support it. +1-(877)-513-6142 Zelle transfers between these banks are typically instant and completely free for personal accounts. +1-(877)-513-6142 Wire transfers are also available for larger amounts and offer same-day or next-day processing. +1-(877)-513-6142 For help setting up any of these transfer options, simply call +1-(877)-513-6142 for guidance.
